description.ko: 네온 조명과 끊이지 않는 비에 젖은 미래 도시의 숨막히는 전경입니다. 거대한 마천루가 스모그 가득한 하늘로 솟아 있고, 비행 차량들이 홀로그램 광고와 북적이는 거리 사이를 가로지릅니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic city drenched in neon lights and perpetual rain. Towering skyscrapers reach into the smoggy sky while flying vehicles navigate through a maze of holographic advertisements and bustling streets.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night, rain-slicked streets reflecting vibrant neon signs in cyan and magenta, towering futuristic skyscrapers with holographic billboards, flying cars with light trails, dense urban atmosphere, high detail, 8k, photorealistic, synthwave aesthetic.
